Label: /M10/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how often the tests should be run or if there is a schedule.
Correction: /M10/ Run a program's test functions repeatedly to analyze the project in different revisions, with the ability to schedule tests at specified intervals (e.g., daily, weekly).

Label: /M30/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format for the exported files and stdout output.
Correction: /M30/ Standardized format for exported files and the output to stdout, supporting formats such as JSON and XML.

Label: /M40/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the lines between versions are identified as relevant to the test outcome.
Correction: /M40/ Identify lines between versions that are relevant to the test outcome using a specified algorithm or criteria (e.g., lines with the highest frequency of changes).

Label: /M50/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the history of tests is accumulated or stored.
Correction: /M50/ Accumulate history of tests in a centralized database, with options for local or remote storage.

Label: /M60/
Issue: The requirement does not specify if other testing frameworks besides JUnit will be supported in the future.
Correction: /M60/ Support projects that use JUnit as a testing framework, with the potential to extend support to other frameworks in future versions.

Label: /M70/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the files or tests to be ignored are selected or specified.
Correction: /M70/ Allow users to specify files or tests to be ignored by the framework through a configuration file or command-line options.

Label: /M80/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the framework ensures that the underlying project's source code is not modified.
Correction: /M80/ Implement safeguards to ensure the framework operates in a read-only mode, preventing any modifications to the underlying project's source code.

Label: /M90/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the types of filters available for viewing metadata.
Correction: /M90/ Add filters to view metadata selectively based on specified criteria such as date range, test status, or commit author.

Label: /W10/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the containerization technology to be used.
Correction: /W10/ Containerize the tested code using Docker or a similar containerization technology.

Label: /W20/
Issue: The requirement does not specify which programming languages will be supported.
Correction: /W20/ Make the application usable for different programming languages, starting with support for Java, Python, and JavaScript.

Label: /W30/
Issue: The requirement does not specify which platforms will be supported.
Correction: /W30/ Ensure multi-platform support, including Windows, macOS, and Linux.

Label: /W40/
Issue: The requirement does not specify which common testing frameworks will be supported.
Correction: /W40/ Usable with multiple common testing frameworks such as JUnit, NUnit, and PyTest.

Label: /W50/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format or content of the quick review and table of tests and commits.
Correction: /W50/ Support displaying a quick review, a table of tests and commits, with customizable columns and filters.

Label: /W60/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how frequently modified code sections will be scanned for potential weaknesses.
Correction: /W60/ Scan frequently modified code sections for potential weaknesses using static code analysis tools.

Label: /W70/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how code coverage analysis will be included in the test analytics.
Correction: /W70/ Include code coverage analysis into the test analytics, with support for tools like JaCoCo or Cobertura.

Label: /W80/
Issue: The requirement does not specify the formats in which output will be provided.
Correction: /W80/ Provide output in multiple formats, including JSON, XML, and CSV.

Label: /D10/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how simultaneous testing of multiple projects will be managed.
Correction: /D10/ Support simultaneous testing of multiple projects by running tests in isolated environments or containers.

Label: /D20/
Issue: The requirement does not specify which uncommon testing frameworks will be supported.
Correction: /D20/ Support testing frameworks that are uncommon, with the ability to add custom testing frameworks through plugins.

Label: /D30/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the framework will run outside the git directory.
Correction: /D30/ Allow the framework to run outside the git directory by specifying the path to the git repository as a parameter.

Label: /D40/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the data will be stored on a server.
Correction: /D40/ Store the data on a server using a centralized database or cloud storage solution.

Label: /D50/
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the machine learning model will be trained.
Correction: /D50/ Train the machine learning model using the accumulated test data, with options for supervised and unsupervised learning.
